summary: Korean HWP/HWPX form-fill MCP server. Client-agnostic (Claude Desktop, Codex, Antigravity 2.0). Python. v1 headless fill, v2 COM live-apply via pyhwpx put_field_text. Differentiators: inline-blank fill, merged-cell 2D understanding, review-then-apply.
status: v0.1.0 released; codex QA passed (all findings fixed)
note: Approved and implemented baseline. This file now tracks the shipped headless codebase plus the approved conservative live contract: exact-path named-field apply via open_in_hwp(path) / apply_to_open_hwp(path, values), exact-path cell apply via preview_cells_to_open_hwp(path, values) / apply_cells_to_open_hwp(path, values), and saved-.hwpx current-document pathless UX via resolve_current_hwp_document / preview_current_hwp_document / apply_to_current_hwp_document. Current-document candidates now expose additive human-readable picker metadata only; selection remains candidate_id-based and fail-closed. Conservative `DocumentSpec v1` generation is now shipped via `create_document_from_spec` with `school.*` section-authoritative routing, `official.*` recipe routing, and explicit rejection of template-owned assets/images and alignment hints. Text replacement also ships an OWN edit-session control plane via preview_search_and_replace / preview_batch_replace / apply_edit_session / restore_edit_session with journal+snapshot artifacts. Stories with passes:true are complete, and desktop-live-pending stories still require literal Windows write-safe evidence. | Stabilization pass (ralplan consensus, .omo/plans/hangeul-mcp-stabilization-ralplan.md): stories US-047..US-060 ARE recorded in this file (BC3); pass count == passes==true.

stories.title: Plan & scope approval gate
acceptanceCriteria: PLAN.md exists with architecture, MCP tool API, data model, roadmap, test strategy
prd.json exists with concrete task-specific acceptance criteria per story
User has reviewed PLAN.md and answered the 5 open questions (section 10)
Repo location, python-hwpx-vs-own-engine decision, and matching-key decision are confirmed

stories.title: Repo scaffold + packaging
acceptanceCriteria: Directory layout matches PLAN.md section 4 (hangeul_core, hangeul_mcp, tests, docs)
pyproject.toml defines package + console entrypoint 'hangeul-mcp'
LICENSE (MIT), README.md, .gitignore present
git repo initialized; `pip install -e .` (or uv sync) succeeds with no error
Sample fixtures copied into tests/fixtures (blank + filled 강사카드)

stories.title: OWPML container I/O (byte-preserving) + substrate decision
acceptanceCriteria: Spike evaluates python-hwpx as substrate; decision recorded in docs/architecture.md (adopt or use own engine)
unpack/repack preserves mimetype as first entry with STORED compression
XML declaration (standalone="yes") preserved byte-for-byte after repack
Round-trip test: repack of untouched file is byte-identical to original (or documented minimal diff)
test_owpml passes

stories.title: Form analyzer (tables, cells, spans, paraPr, charPr)
acceptanceCriteria: analyze() returns tables with cells addressed by rowAddr/colAddr and colSpan/rowSpan
Detects empty cells, bullet paragraphs (heading type=BULLET), and charPr spacing
Golden test on 강사카드(양식).hwpx reproduces the known 표2 field set (성명, 주민등록번호, 학력, 경력×3, 현직, etc.)
test_analyze passes

stories.title: Form understanding: 2D label-value mapping (merged-cell aware)
acceptanceCriteria: Maps labels to their value cells including label-above-value and merged (span) layouts
Emits FieldSchema per PLAN.md section 5 with field kind classification
On the 강사카드(양식) fixture, correctly identifies 성명/직위/휴대전화 value cells (not adjacent labels)
test_understand passes

stories.title: Inline-blank detector (mid-sentence / mid-cell blanks)
acceptanceCriteria: Detects patterns like '∘ ___ 을 졸업하시고' and '은행명: ___ 계좌번호: ___' as kind=inline_blank with insert positions
Distinguishes inline_blank from empty_cell and bullet_item
Golden test on the 강사카드(양식) narrative rows (학력/경력/현직) passes
test_inline passes

stories.title: Format-preserving fill engine (set/append/inline)
acceptanceCriteria: Fills empty_cell (set), bullet_item (append after marker, no duplicate '-'/'∘'), inline_blank (mid-run insert)
Multi-line values become real paragraphs/lineBreaks (no raw \n inside <hp:t>)
Spacing normalization option produces spacing=0 without affecting untouched runs
Round-trip test: filled fields present AND all untouched regions byte-identical AND well-formed AND mimetype/declaration preserved
test_fill passes

stories.title: MCP server (v1 headless) via FastMCP stdio
acceptanceCriteria: Server built on official MCP Python SDK (FastMCP), stdio transport
Exposes tools: detect_format, analyze_form, fill_form, extract_text with JSON schemas
An MCP client smoke test (or mcp dev/inspector) lists the 4 tools and calls fill_form end-to-end on a fixture
Tools are pure (params in -> JSON out), no client-specific assumptions

stories.title: Client-agnostic config docs + verification
acceptanceCriteria: docs/clients/ contains registration snippets for Claude Desktop, Codex, and Antigravity 2.0
Server starts via the documented stdio command for each client
README documents that only MCP tools are used (max client compatibility)
At least one non-Claude client (Codex or Antigravity) verified to list tools

stories.title: COM bridge (v2) via pyhwpx with environment guard
acceptanceCriteria: hwp/com.py attaches to a running 한글 instance, get_field_list works, put_field_text(dict) fills fields
Off-Windows or 한글-not-installed: import/guard returns available:false gracefully (no crash)
Security file-access prompt handling documented (FilePathCheckerModule)
Guarded integration test passes on a machine with 한글 (skips elsewhere)
stories.statusNote: COM bridge code + headless-gated tests complete; real-desktop COM evidence pending (US-053 / PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA).

stories.title: apply_to_open_hwp MCP tool + review->apply workflow (attach-first guidance, active-document write)
acceptanceCriteria: hwp_status, open_in_hwp, apply_to_open_hwp tools exposed

Preferred live flows are open_in_hwp(path) -> apply_to_open_hwp(path, values) for named fields, preview_cells_to_open_hwp(path, values) -> apply_cells_to_open_hwp(path, values) for cell routes, and resolve_current_hwp_document -> preview_current_hwp_document -> apply_to_current_hwp_document for saved current .hwpx docs
Pathful apply_to_open_hwp(path, values) is broker-targeted exact-path live apply; docs/tests MUST still treat Windows write-safe evidence as a separate desktop QA gate
Returns applied[] and skipped[] with reasons plus opened/attached_existing state as applicable; returns needs_field_registration when no named fields exist
End-to-end demo: analyze -> (LLM draft) -> exact-path attach-first or saved current-document preview/apply -> intended live document fill
resolve_current_hwp_document candidates include additive picker_title/picker_subtitle/picker_badges/picker_label metadata for human selection without weakening candidate_id-based fail-closed routing
stories.statusNote: Named-field exact-path apply and saved-.hwpx current-document tooling are implemented, including additive picker metadata and artifact-harness scaffolding, but literal Windows write-safe evidence remains pending under US-053 / PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.

stories.title: Review->apply Agent Skill (thin orchestration)
acceptanceCriteria: skills/SKILL.md guides: analyze_form -> draft -> user review -> fill_form or apply_to_open_hwp
Skill instructs value generation to respect field kind (bullets, inline, checkbox)
Documented usage from Claude Desktop

stories.title: CI, golden fixtures, .hwp policy, release
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs tests on push (GitHub Actions) green
.hwp input policy implemented per user decision (reject-with-guidance or auto-convert)
README quickstart verified; version tag cut
Coverage of core modules documented

stories.title: {placeholder} global replace + shared section-wide locate/splice primitive
stories.notes: Build order FIRST: establishes the shared per-paragraph concatenated-text->char-span mapper reused by US-014/US-015/US-016. Own core (gap-analysis 3-A), not delegation.
acceptanceCriteria: New KIND_PLACEHOLDER in schema; detect_placeholders(path) scans every Contents/section*.xml for {token} occurrences (itertext-aware) and emits Field(kind=placeholder, label=token-name-without-braces)
Detects tokens even when split across runs/<hp:t> within a paragraph (shared paragraph offset mapper) and tokens inside table/nested-table cells
fill_form replaces EVERY occurrence of each provided {token} with the client value (braces removed), preserving the token's run/charPr; duplicate tokens all replaced
Values are client-provided only (brain/hand separation): unknown tokens are left byte-untouched and reported in skipped/unfilled

Byte-preservation: every unchanged ZIP entry payload byte-identical (a.read(name)==b.read(name)); mimetype first STORED; section keeps standalone="yes" declaration; section well-formed (ET.fromstring)
Golden test (synthetic hwpx) + regressions: token split across two runs, token in nested table, same token twice; pyflakes clean; all prior 56 tests still green

stories.title: 형광펜(markpen) placeholder kind
acceptanceCriteria: New KIND_MARKPEN; detector records each hp:markpenBegin..hp:markpenEnd highlighted text (carried as tail) plus location, deriving label from nearest preceding label with a synthesized fallback
analyze_form returns a markpen field per highlighted region with the sample text; multiple regions become distinct fields
fill_form replaces ONLY the highlighted text, leaving hp:markpenBegin/hp:markpenEnd tags intact so the highlight is preserved (assert both new text and markpen tags present)
Existing tests/test_markpen.py (analyze reads highlighted itertext) stays green — the itertext reading is not broken
Byte-preservation + well-formed + mimetype/declaration golden pattern; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: 체크박스(☑/□) 탐지·선택 (KIND_CHECKBOX)
acceptanceCriteria: Add options field to Field dataclass and include it in hangeul_mcp.server._field_dict (additive, backward-compatible)
detect_checkbox groups consecutive [glyph][label] tokens (glyph set □ ☐ ☑ ☒ ■ ▣ √) within a paragraph/cell into one KIND_CHECKBOX field with options=[{label, checked}]
analyze_form JSON includes options with per-option checked state

fill_form value = option label(s) to check: toggles chosen option box □->☑; default exclusive unchecks the others (☑->□); checkbox_exclusive=False leaves others unchanged; unknown option -> skipped, no glyph changed
Byte-preservation + well-formed + mimetype/declaration; regressions: glyph split across runs, re-checking an already-checked option is idempotent; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: 누름틀(form field) 헤드리스 fill (no COM)
stories.notes: Spike the real hp:fieldBegin..hp:fieldEnd XML shape first; detector regex is attribute-order robust.
acceptanceCriteria: New KIND_FORMFIELD; detect_form_fields scans hp:fieldBegin(name=..)..hp:fieldEnd controls, resolving name from the name attribute or a parameterSet, and records the field's text span
analyze_form returns form_field fields keyed by field name/label
fill_form fills the field content headlessly (no COM), preserving hp:fieldBegin/hp:fieldEnd controls (replace existing placeholder text, not append)
Value schema parity with COM apply_to_open_hwp: the same name-keyed values dict works for both headless and COM paths (documented; unit test on key handling)
No named fields -> analyze returns none of this kind gracefully (consistent with COM needs_field_registration)
Byte-preservation + well-formed + mimetype/declaration; regressions: parameterSet-named vs attribute-named field; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: form-fit / 쪽수 드리프트 가드 (overflow guard + opt-in auto-fit)
stories.notes: No renderer available; overflow is a documented heuristic estimate, not layout truth. True visual verification deferred to Phase B render_preview.
acceptanceCriteria: Tier1 (MUST): analyze_formfit(path, values) estimates per-field fill width (char classes x font height x width factor) vs cell capacity (cellSz/hp:sz width in HWPUNIT minus inMargin) and returns overflow warnings with field_id + estimated ratio; a comfortably-fitting value yields no warning; pure measurement, no mutation
Heuristic (formula + Hangul/latin width factors + assumptions) is documented and unit-tested on synthetic widths; explicit non-goal: pixel-perfect layout

Tier2 (opt-in): fill_form(auto_fit=True) shrinks only the target run's font/spacing via a cloned charPr (reusing the _clone_charpr pattern) stepwise to a documented min floor; reports applied shrink per field; untouched runs stay byte-identical; no zero/negative sizes
auto_fit=False (default) never mutates formatting — pure fill, backward-compatible with all existing fill tests
Byte-preservation + well-formed + mimetype/declaration; golden/regression: overflow fixture flagged, fitting value no-op, auto-fit floor respected; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: PII 마스킹 게이트 (코드화)
acceptanceCriteria: hangeul_core/pii.py: scan_text(text) detects 주민등록번호/외국인등록번호, 전화번호, 신용카드번호, 계좌번호(heuristic), 이메일 with type + span + masked form
mask_value(text) masks detected PII (keeps format, hides sensitive digits) without altering non-PII text
fill_form(mask_pii=True) masks PII inside provided values before writing and reports a masked[] list; mask_pii=False (default) is unchanged behavior
New MCP tool scan_pii(path) audits a document's text and returns findings (no mutation)
Tests use synthetic (fake) PII patterns only; no real PII committed; golden + regression; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: dry-run + 편집 전 백업
acceptanceCriteria: fill(dry_run=True) computes filled/skipped/shrunk WITHOUT writing out_path (no file created); returns the same report shape
fill(backup=True) copies the destination to <out>.bak before overwriting an existing file
fill_form exposes dry_run and backup; defaults preserve current behavior
Golden + regression: dry-run writes nothing, backup created only when overwriting; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: 읽기 확장 (find_text / outline / styles)
acceptanceCriteria: find_text(path, query) returns occurrences with section + containing cell/paragraph context and a total count (read-only)
get_document_outline(path) returns a structural summary: sections, tables (rows/cols), field/kind counts, and heading-like paragraphs
list_styles(path) returns charPr/paraPr style ids with key attributes (font height, spacing, bullet)
Three new read-only MCP tools; built on existing analyze/extract; no mutation; golden tests; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: validate_hwpx (well-formed + optional XSD)
acceptanceCriteria: validate_hwpx(path) checks: every XML entry well-formed (ET.fromstring), mimetype first + STORED + correct value, section XML declaration present
Returns {valid, well_formed, mimetype_ok, declaration_ok, errors[], xsd:{available, valid?}}; a corrupted XML entry yields valid=False with a specific error
If python-hwpx is installed, run its XSD validation and include the result; otherwise xsd.available=False (soft dependency, D1)
New MCP tool validate_hwpx; golden + regression (valid passes, corrupted fails); pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: 일반 텍스트 치환 (search_and_replace / batch_replace) — OWN, byte-preserving
stories.notes: Done with our own byte-splice engine (locate.replace_literals), NOT python-hwpx — preserves the byte invariant and needs no new dependency. Structural editing (paragraphs/tables/rich formatting/images) remains DELEGATE to python-hwpx pending a dependency decision. The shipped surface now also includes immutable preview/apply edit sessions with journal+snapshot restore artifacts for this OWN text path only.
acceptanceCriteria: locate.replace_literals(section, mapping) replaces arbitrary literal substrings inside <hp:t> text (run-split aware, boundary-guarded so a match never bridges a cell/paragraph/table), longest-match-first with no chained re-replacement
search_and_replace(path, find, replace, out_path) replaces all occurrences and returns a count; batch_replace(path, mapping, out_path) applies multiple find->replace pairs in a single pass
Byte-preservation: unchanged ZIP entries byte-identical; mimetype first STORED; section keeps standalone declaration; well-formed
Two new MCP tools (search_and_replace, batch_replace); tags/attributes never touched (only <hp:t> text)
Golden + regression (run-split match, multiple pairs, overlapping finds longest wins, no cross-cell bleed); pyflakes clean; full suite green

preview_search_and_replace / preview_batch_replace expose immutable OWN edit plans with counts, changed_entries, and audit lines; apply_edit_session writes a journal+snapshot artifact and restore_edit_session replays that snapshot honestly

stories.title: DELEGATE 내보내기/미리보기 (python-hwpx) — hwpx_to_html / hwpx_to_markdown
stories.notes: python-hwpx is a soft/optional dependency (extra 'delegate'). Its warnings go to stderr, safe for the stdio MCP server. Read-only, so no byte concern. Partially delivers Phase B render_preview (HTML) too.
acceptanceCriteria: hangeul_core/delegate.py guards python-hwpx as a soft dependency: available() check + a clear RuntimeError/'available:false' when it is not installed (core stays dependency-light)
to_html / to_markdown / to_text_rich wrap HwpxDocument.export_html/export_markdown/export_text
New read-only MCP tools hwpx_to_html and hwpx_to_markdown return the rendered string (or available:false)
pyproject declares an optional extra 'delegate' = python-hwpx; tests use pytest.importorskip('hwpx') so they skip cleanly where the dep is absent (CI stays green)
Golden tests on the real fixture assert the rendered output contains known text (성명); pyflakes clean; full suite green
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: DELEGATE 구조 편집 (python-hwpx) — add_paragraph / add_table + 검증 게이트
stories.notes: Delegated structural edits re-serialize via lxml (NOT byte-identical) — the invariant here is our validate_hwpx gate, not byte preservation. Our own fill/recognition core keeps byte-splice.
acceptanceCriteria: add_paragraph(path, text, out_path) and add_table(path, rows, cols, out_path) wrap python-hwpx, saving via save_to_path (not the deprecated save)
Each delegated edit runs the output through validate_hwpx and includes the report; the edit is only reported success when valid is True
New MCP tools add_paragraph and add_table; available:false when python-hwpx is absent
Tests (importorskip hwpx): new content present in the output AND validate_hwpx valid is True; pyflakes clean; full suite green
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: DELEGATE 문서 생성 (python-hwpx) — markdown/text → HWPX
stories.notes: 두뇌·손 분리 유지: 문안 생성은 클라이언트 LLM, 서버는 구조 조립만.
acceptanceCriteria: create_from_markdown(markdown, out_path) builds a new HWPX from client-provided markdown/text via python-hwpx (converter or add_paragraph assembly)
New MCP tool create_hwpx_from_markdown; available:false when python-hwpx is absent
Output passes validate_hwpx (valid True) and contains the provided content
Tests (importorskip hwpx): created file valid + content present; pyflakes clean; full suite green
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: mail_merge (대량 생성) — OWN, 우리 fill 엔진 + 레코드 반복
stories.notes: OWN (byte-preserving fill per record), not python-hwpx. Reuses every fill kind (empty_cell/inline/placeholder/markpen/checkbox/누름틀). 두뇌·손 분리: records are client-provided.
acceptanceCriteria: hangeul_core/mailmerge.py: mail_merge(template_path, records, out_dir) fills the template once per record via the byte-preserving fill engine and writes numbered outputs
Returns a per-record summary (index, out_path, filled/skipped counts) and a total count; supports the same value keys as fill (field_id/label/placeholder/checkbox/markpen/누름틀)
Each output is a byte-preserving fill of the template (untouched entries identical) and passes validate_hwpx (valid True)
New MCP tool mail_merge(template_path, records, out_dir, mask_pii=false); records are client-provided
Golden test: N records -> N files, each containing its own values; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: DELEGATE 이미지 삽입 (add_image / 도장·서명) — python-hwpx
stories.notes: Delegated to python-hwpx add_picture. Output validated via our gate. Image bytes are read from a client-provided file path.
acceptanceCriteria: delegate.add_picture(path, image_path, out_path, width_mm, height_mm) reads the image bytes, infers format from the extension, delegates HwpxDocument.add_picture, saves, and validates the output
New MCP tool add_image(path, image_path, out_path, width_mm, height_mm); available:false when python-hwpx is absent
Output passes validate_hwpx (valid True) and the document's image count increases by one
Tests (importorskip hwpx) using a tiny synthetic PNG; pyflakes clean; full suite green
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: OWN 갭 마감 — verify_fill / get_table_map / find_cell_by_label
stories.notes: Closes the remaining gap-analysis §A items in our core area, exposing existing analyze/understand as MCP tools + a verification helper. Read-only, OWN, no deps.
acceptanceCriteria: verify_fill(path, expected) confirms each expected value actually appears in the document text; returns verified + present[] + missing[] (whitespace-insensitive)
get_table_map(path) exposes analyze cells structured: per table rows/cols and per cell field_id/row/col/spans/text/is_empty
find_cell_by_label(path, label) returns the label cell field_id(s) and the mapped value-cell field_id (via understand)
Three new read-only MCP tools; built on existing analyze/understand/extract; golden tests on the real fixture; pyflakes clean; full suite green

stories.title: 라이브 셀 채우기 — 누름틀 없이 exact-path로 식별한 열린 한글 문서의 셀을 직접 채우기
stories.notes: Headline capability requires two proofs kept separate: (1) raw probe/json that exact-path resolver-path exists, and (2) interactive Windows literal write-safe evidence. Generic reconnect/connected:true is never sufficient proof.
acceptanceCriteria: resolve_cell_targets(path, values) maps each value key (field_id or label) to a table-cell address (table/row/col) using analyze/understand — PURE, unit-tested
Safe attach path is ROT enumeration -> all XHwpDocuments -> normalized FullName exact match only; generic reconnect to an empty automation broker does not qualify
preview_cells_to_open_hwp(path, values) returns attach metadata together with target count/table/row/col without mutating any document

apply_cells_to_open_hwp(path, values, open_if_needed) writes only after same-doc exact-path confirmation; open_if_needed may open the target doc, otherwise it rejects with active_document context — on_quit=False so the window is NOT closed
Graceful available:false when pyhwpx/Windows is absent (no crash) — unit-tested
New MCP tool apply_cells_to_open_hwp(path, values); apply_to_open_hwp's needs_field_registration response points cell-forms to it; optional "live" extra (pyhwpx)
LIVE VALIDATION (client-side, PENDING): raw probe/json proves resolver-path existence and desktop QA proves literal write-safe fill of the intended document in Claude Desktop
stories.statusNote: Resolver-path evidence exists, but literal desktop write-safe verification remains pending (D7 nested-table mapping is best-effort).

stories.title: form-fit 정확도 — 병합셀 폭 + 미세축소 오탐 감소 (실사용 피드백)
acceptanceCriteria: Investigation: cellSz width already reflects colSpan (merged cells) — formfit width is span-aware; documented
overflow_scale gains a deadband (default 1.05): text within ~5% of the cell width is treated as fitting (no 94-99% micro-shrinks)
fill reports overflow warnings ALWAYS (FillResult.overflow), even without auto_fit, so clients can shorten instead of shrink
Golden + regression; existing formfit tests stay green; pyflakes clean

stories.title: 체크박스 라벨 유도 개선 + 선택유형 힌트 (실사용 피드백)
acceptanceCriteria: Label derivation: leading text -> left cell -> header cell above -> descriptive fallback from option texts (fixes unidentifiable '선택N')
select_type hint (yes_no|select) exposed via template; option-label cap widened 24->40 for long section titles
Golden + regression; existing checkbox tests stay green; pyflakes clean

stories.title: analyze_form 용량 힌트 (capacity_hint) — 생성 전 셀 크기 인지
acceptanceCriteria: Empty-cell fields carry capacity_hint = approx max Korean chars = (cell width - inner margin) / font height
Computed in understand (lazy formfit import, no cycle), surfaced in analyze_form _field_dict
Golden tests on the real fixture; pyflakes clean

stories.title: PII 자동 경고 (warn-first) in fill
acceptanceCriteria: fill scans every value for PII on every run and reports FillResult.pii_warnings ({key, types, masked}) regardless of mask_pii
mask_pii=True marks masked:true and masks the value; off flags but leaves as-is; surfaced in fill_form
Golden + regression; existing PII tests stay green; pyflakes clean

stories.title: DELEGATE 리치 서식 — emphasize_text (bold/italic/underline/color/size)
stories.notes: Whole-run scope (does not split sub-run substrings). Structurally verified: a matched run's .bold is True after reopening.
acceptanceCriteria: emphasize_text(path, find, out, bold/italic/underline/color/size) applies one ensured charPr (ensure_run_style) to every run whose text contains find, saves, and validates
New MCP tool emphasize_text returning matched_runs; available:false when python-hwpx absent
Tests (importorskip): a matched run becomes bold after reopening; color/size output stays valid; no-match is a valid no-op; pyflakes clean
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: DELEGATE 표 생성 — 2D 데이터로 채운 표 (create_hwpx_table)
acceptanceCriteria: create_table_from_rows(rows, out) builds a new HWPX with one table sized to the data (ragged rows padded), fills via set_cell_text, saves, validates
New MCP tool create_hwpx_table(rows, out_path); available:false when python-hwpx absent
Tests (importorskip): content present, correct rows/cols in outline, ragged padded, empty rejected, output valid; pyflakes clean
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: DELEGATE 공문 레시피 — create_official_document
stories.notes: 두뇌·손 분리: 문안은 클라이언트, 서버는 표준 공문 스켈레톤 조립만. 추가 문서유형(보도자료/기안문)은 후속.
acceptanceCriteria: create_official_document(fields, out) lays out a 공문 skeleton from 기관명/수신/참조/제목/본문/날짜/발신명의/담당자 and validates
New MCP tool create_official_document; unknown keys ignored; available:false when python-hwpx absent
Tests (importorskip): content present in order (수신 < 제목 < 본문), unknown keys ignored, output valid; pyflakes clean
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: DELEGATE 레시피 확장 — 보도자료 + 기안문 (doc_type)
acceptanceCriteria: create_official_document gains a doc_type param dispatching to per-type skeleton builders: 공문, 보도자료(기관명/배포일/담당/연락처/제목/부제/본문/문의), 기안문(제목/기안자/기안일/시행일/수신/목적/내용/붙임)
Unknown doc_type falls back to 공문; doc_type reported in the result; MCP tool gains doc_type
Tests (importorskip): each type's content present + output valid + fallback; pyflakes clean
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: DELEGATE 기존 표 merge + 셀음영
stories.notes: python-hwpx 2.24.0 exposes table.merge_cells and table.set_cell_shading; use delegated edit + validate gate.
acceptanceCriteria: merge_table_cells(path, table_index, cell_range, out_path) merges an existing table range and validates output
set_cell_shading(path, table_index, row, col, fill_color, out_path) applies cell shading and validates output
New MCP tools return available:false without python-hwpx and structured ok:false errors for invalid table/range/color
Tests cover merge, shading, invalid inputs, server tools, and validate_hwpx
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: DELEGATE complete-control builder — create_document_from_blocks
stories.notes: D6 escape hatch: all content and layout blocks are client-provided; no hidden prose or recipe fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: create_document_from_blocks(blocks, out_path) supports heading, paragraph, bullet_list, numbered_list, table, image, and page_break blocks
New MCP tool exposes the builder and validates output
Unknown block types, empty blocks, and malformed tables return structured ok:false errors
Tests verify block order, text presence, table output, server tool shape, and validate_hwpx
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: 구조보존 markdown → HWPX supported subset
stories.notes: Route markdown through create_document_from_blocks; support a documented subset, not full CommonMark.
acceptanceCriteria: create_hwpx_from_markdown preserves headings, unordered/ordered lists, paragraphs, and pipe tables as document structure where supported
Existing simple markdown creation remains valid and text-compatible
README documents the supported subset and non-goals
Tests verify heading/list/table structure, server tool output, and validate_hwpx
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx); returns available:false without it; tests importorskip('hwpx').

stories.title: render_preview PNG — browser-backed optional preview
stories.notes: Use local HTTP serving for Playwright screenshots; no file:// rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: render_preview(path, out_path, format='png') creates a PNG when Playwright and a browser are available
The tool returns available:false with a setup hint when render dependencies are unavailable
Generated PNGs report file size and dimensions when possible
Tests cover missing dependency behavior and at least one real local PNG proof when the browser is installed
stories.statusNote: requires optional extras 'render' (playwright + chromium); returns available:false without them.

stories.title: .hwp 헤드리스 읽기 adapter gate
stories.notes: No local pyhwp/hwp5/rhwp/kordoc substrate is installed yet; do not mislabel COM conversion as headless reading.
acceptanceCriteria: extract_hwp_text(path) exposes a non-COM headless adapter surface
When no substrate is installed, the tool returns available:false with checked candidate modules and no COM side effects
If a substrate is later installed, a real PII-free .hwp fixture must pass before marking complete
Tests cover dependency-missing behavior and preserve existing COM conversion policy tests
stories.statusNote: adapter gate delivered and tested; actual non-COM .hwp extraction awaits substrate decision (ADR D12, US-054/US-055).

stories.title: BYO-AI 로컬 하네스 제품 방향 문서화
acceptanceCriteria: README states that Hangeul-mcp is a local MCP document engine, not a server-side LLM/API billing app
docs/byo-ai-harness.md documents file fill, document generation, live preview/apply, and privacy boundaries
DECISIONS records the no server-side LLM/API boundary and the FILE vs LIVE split

stories.title: Capability manifest for MCP clients
acceptanceCriteria: describe_capabilities returns product, mode=byo_ai_local_harness, server_side_llm=false, runtime, and capability groups
Capability groups include file_hwpx, delegate_hwpx, render, live_hwp, and hwp_headless
MCP server exposes describe_capabilities and tests verify the tool shape

stories.title: Live cell-fill preview before apply
acceptanceCriteria: preview_cells_to_open_hwp resolves table/row/col targets without dispatching COM or touching an open Hangul window
apply_cells_to_open_hwp remains the only cell live-apply tool that mutates the open document
Tests cover pure preview target resolution and server tool registration

stories.title: No-API dependency guard
acceptanceCriteria: Project dependencies do not add OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/PydanticAI SDKs
Tests assert no banned LLM API SDK dependency is present
Docs clarify that user's AI client may still decide what document data it sends to its own model

stories.title: prd.json 기계판독 상태 매트릭스 도입
acceptanceCriteria: every story has status in statusModel.enum; complete implies passes==true; pending statuses carry statusNote
tests/test_prd_status.py enforces the invariants
existing story contents unchanged (only status/statusNote added)

stories.title: README 카운트 동기화 + 파싱대상 특정 드리프트 가드
acceptanceCriteria: README 'NN tools' (repo-tree) dynamically equals len(mcp.list_tools()) via tests/test_maintainability.py
README status line 'NN개 — MM pass' dynamically equals prd story count and passes==true count
both occurrences parsed by labeled regexes; test-count guard stays soft (documented regeneration)

stories.title: HANDOFF.md 대체 + 상태 매트릭스 SSOT
acceptanceCriteria: HANDOFF.md rewritten to current baseline with 4-state matrix SSOT
stale tokens ('56 passed', '6툴', 'Phase A~D 전부') grep 0 hits
README/ROADMAP/HANDOFF counts mutually consistent

stories.title: 파일모드 e2e 증거팩 드라이버
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/e2e_evidence.py runs capabilities->analyze->scan_pii->fill(dry)->fill->verify->validate->render chain on sample_form.hwpx
evidence under gitignored build/evidence/; regeneration documented
dry_run writes nothing; real fill byte-preserves untouched entries; render available:false recorded honestly when absent

stories.title: CI extras 레인 dev+delegate+render
acceptanceCriteria: CI job installs .[dev,delegate,render] + playwright chromium and runs pytest on ubuntu
win32-only live/com tests not forced in CI
local-extras baseline vs CI core lane distinction documented

stories.title: 라이브 QA 준비 — fixture/runbook + 순수부 테스트
acceptanceCriteria: PII-free live fixture + values mapping + runbook (hwp_status -> preview -> apply)
preview pure computation, hwp_status side-effect-free, apply available:false without substrate — all unit-tested

stories.title: live apply 실기기 검증 또는 명시적 PENDING
acceptanceCriteria: desktop evidence captured OR PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md exists with observed hwp_status/preview raw probe output
PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md explicitly separates exact-path resolver-path evidence from remaining literal write-safe QA
US-029 not promoted without desktop literal write evidence; D7 best-effort re-affirmed
stories.statusNote: explicit pending closure: raw probe/json may show resolver-path existence, but this session did not capture new Windows literal write-safe evidence; PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md remains the status truth; US-029 is NOT promoted.

stories.title: .hwp headless substrate 후보 비교 스파이크 + ADR(D12)
acceptanceCriteria: candidate table (license/installability/API/fixture) + go/no-go recorded as ADR D12
no viable substrate => adapter gate kept; test_hwp_headless green; COM never disguised as headless (D9)

stories.title: (조건부) substrate 어댑터 구현 또는 keep-gate 종결
acceptanceCriteria: IF go + PII-free .hwp fixture: non-COM extraction test (fails without substrate, passes with)
ELSE zero code change; keep-gate rationale in ADR; spike-pending kept
stories.statusNote: keep-gate closure per ADR D12: no viable non-COM substrate (pyhwp AGPL/beta, rhwp/kordoc not pip libs, hwp5 namespace squatted); PII-free .hwp fixture prerequisite unmet; zero code change. olefile/PrvText route deferred to a future story.

stories.title: 상류 delegate API-표면 스파이크 (ADR D13 + surface test)
acceptanceCriteria: ADR D13: supported={header/footer, page-setup, split_merged_cell}, unsupported={row/col add-remove, TOC}
tests/test_delegate_api_surface.py: existence of supported methods = hard assert; absence of unsupported = soft tripwire only (BC1, never red on upstream additions)
pyproject delegate floor python-hwpx>=2.24,<3; no tools added in this story

stories.title: 머리말/꼬리말 delegate 툴 (set_header/set_footer)
acceptanceCriteria: MCP tools wrap set_header_text/set_footer_text with validate gate
BC2: saved package re-opened and header/footer XML asserted to contain the text
absent python-hwpx -> available:false; missing method -> structured 'requires python-hwpx>=2.24'
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx>=2.24); available:false without it.

stories.title: 페이지 설정 delegate 툴 (size/margins/columns)
acceptanceCriteria: MCP tools wrap set_page_size/set_page_margins/set_columns (page number only if API-verified) with validate gate
BC2: saved package re-opened; section XML properties asserted changed (validate_hwpx alone insufficient)
invalid args -> structured ok:false
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx>=2.24); available:false without it.

stories.title: 병합셀 분할 delegate 툴 (split_merged_cell)
acceptanceCriteria: G1: test asserts the input actually contains a merged cell (loud precondition; vacuous pass impossible)
after split, cell map shows unmerged region; validate_hwpx.valid==True
absent/old python-hwpx -> structured fallback
stories.statusNote: requires optional extra 'delegate' (python-hwpx>=2.24); split of MERGED cells only (D13).

stories.title: 표 행/열·TOC spike-pending 재분류 ADR
acceptanceCriteria: ADR records python-hwpx non-support (row/col add-remove, TOC) + OWN feasibility verdict with D1/byte-preservation constraint
no acceptance commitments to unsupported behaviors; zero delegate code for these
stories.statusNote: features stay unprovided: python-hwpx 2.24 lacks row/col & TOC APIs (D13); OWN feasibility verdict in ADR D14 (row/col implement-later conditional, page-numbered TOC keep-out); surface tripwire re-triggers review.

stories.title: BYO-AI 오독 방지 — live status/경계 안내를 서버 응답에 내장
acceptanceCriteria: hwp_status idle response carries note (side-effect-free semantics) + next (tool guidance) fields
live tool descriptions state the value-only / no-formatting boundary
describe_capabilities live note states value-only boundary and connected:false semantics
tests/test_live_guidance.py enforces all three; full suite green

stories.title: live extra가 pyhwpx 미선언 전이 의존성(numpy/pandas/pyperclip/pillow)을 명시
acceptanceCriteria: pyproject [project.optional-dependencies].live가 pyhwpx+numpy+pandas+pyperclip+pillow(win32 마커)를 선언하고 이유 주석을 갖는다
tests/test_maintainability.py 가드가 5개 선언 존재를 강제한다
근거: 2026-07-10 실기기에서 pyhwpx 설치-but-import실패가 live_available:false로 위장됨(PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md)

stories.title: 라이브 UX 재정의 — open_in_hwp 진입점 + apply 활성문서 검증/자동 open 폴백 + hwp_status 인스턴스 노출
acceptanceCriteria: open_in_hwp(path): exact-path 문서가 이미 제어 가능하면 attached_existing:true, 아니면 자동화 인스턴스로 .hwp/.hwpx를 visible 창에 열고 opened/active_document 반환(저장·닫기 없음); 파일부재/비Windows/pyhwpx부재는 구조화 폴백
apply_cells_to_open_hwp가 attach 후 활성 문서==path를 검증: 불일치 시 open_if_needed(기본 true)면 자동 open 후 채움(opened:true), false면 active_document 포함 구조화 거절 — 무관 문서 오염 방지
hwp_status가 ROT instances(모니커/문서수/활성문서, inspect-only)와 attach_boundary(unsafe generic reconnect 금지, exact-path 안내)를 노출; tests/test_live_guidance.py·test_live_open.py가 헤드리스 계약을 강제

실기기 증거는 open_in_hwp opened:true 뿐 아니라 attached_existing/exact-path 분기와, named-field의 경우 attach 후 active-document apply_to_open_hwp(values) 경로까지 다뤄야 한다; 현 문서 세트에서는 PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md가 그 QA gate를 유지한다
stories.statusNote: hand-opened documents are no longer documented as categorically unattainable; only exact-path matches qualify, and remaining literal write-safe proof lives in PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md.

stories.title: 라이브 콜드 스타트 안내 + 모달 대화상자 자동응답 가드
acceptanceCriteria: open_in_hwp/apply_cells_to_open_hwp 응답에 cold_start(첫 호출이 한글을 기동하는지)와 elapsed_seconds가 포함된다
라이브 호출 동안 SetMessageBoxMode(0x2FFF1)로 모달 대화상자를 자동응답하고, finally에서 이전 모드를 복원한다 — 보이지 않는 대화상자에 매달려 무한 대기하지 않음
hwp_status.first_call_hint + open_in_hwp/apply_cells/apply_to_open_hwp(values) 툴 설명에 콜드 스타트 경고가 있고 tests/test_live_guidance.py가 강제한다
stories.statusNote: 근거: Claude Desktop에서 첫 open_in_hwp가 한글 콜드 스타트로 수십 초 걸려 '멈춘 것처럼' 보임(2026-07-11).

stories.title: 인라인 빈칸(콜론/마커/체크박스) 라이브 채우기 — 파일-필 미러 + 셀 텍스트 대체
acceptanceCriteria: hangeul_core/hwp/live_inline.py: compute_cell_text_replacements가 파일 fill 엔진을 임시 산출에 돌려 셀별 최종 텍스트를 diff, 변경 셀을 (table,row,col,lines,labels) 텍스트 타깃으로 반환(PURE, 헤드리스 테스트)
apply_text_targets가 셀 내용 리스트를 MoveListBegin→MoveSelListEnd로 전체 선택 후 Delete(셀-객체 블록 Delete는 원문 잔존, 실측 2026-07-11)하고 문단 단위로 재작성
preview/apply가 direct(empty_cell) 타깃과 text(inline) 타깃을 함께 반환; 툴 설명에 인라인 값은 리치서식 평탄화(파일 모드가 바이트보존 골드패스) 경계 명시
데스크톱 실증은 pending: inline live write-safe QA는 fresh Windows capture가 다시 필요하며, 현 상태에서는 exact-path guidance/implementation과 헤드리스 검증만 확정 사실로 본다
stories.statusNote: 인라인 라이브는 셀 전체 텍스트를 재작성하므로 셀 내 리치서식이 평탄화된다 — 서식 보존이 필요하면 파일 모드(fill_form) 사용.

stories.title: 표 밖 본문 문단 채우기 — 구조적 열거 + 동적 마커 감지(파일 바이트보존 + 라이브)
acceptanceCriteria: hangeul_core/body.py: 표에 속하지 않은 본문 문단을 구조적으로 열거(field_id b{n}, 현재텍스트 template, 마커 접두부). 마커 감지는 유니코드 So/Sm/Po/Pd 범주 기반(□○―※ 하드코딩 금지) — 양식별 스타일에 동적 적응. 채울 대상 판단은 클라이언트 LLM 몫
파일 모드: fill()이 b{n} 키를 마커 보존 바이트보존 splice로 교체(<hp:t> 텍스트만, 표 래퍼 문단은 스킵). 실측: 정부 보고서 양식에서 section0.xml만 변경, 미대상 문단 불변
라이브: hangeul_core/hwp/live_body.py가 문서순서 정렬(우리 body 순번 == HWP list-0 leaf 문단, 래퍼는 멀티라인이라 자동 스킵)로 열린 창의 문단 텍스트를 마커 뒤부터 교체
analyze_form이 body_para 필드를 노출; 런타임 툴 수 43 유지(신규 MCP 툴 없음, 기존 툴 확장)

LIVE VALIDATION (desktop, PENDING): fresh Windows QA must still capture open_in_hwp→preview(body_targets)→apply plus read-back for b1/b2/b3/b4 before this story can be promoted from desktop-live-pending
stories.statusNote: Body-paragraph file/live implementation and headless coverage are in place, but fresh Windows literal write-safe proof remains pending under PENDING_DESKTOP_LIVE_QA.md; until then this stays desktop-live-pending.

decisions.substrate: own byte-preserving engine (core) + python-hwpx for XSD validation & security hardening
decisions.hwp_input: v1 auto-convert to HWPX (COM-first, LibreOffice/H2Orestart fallback)

rules: desktop-live-pending / spike-pending require statusNote explaining the missing evidence
planned = accepted stabilization-pass story not yet executed (US-047..US-060)
statusModel.passCountDefinition: pass count in docs (README status line) == number of stories with passes==true (BC3/Minor-1; independent of status field)
statusModel.countsAreMovingOutputs: story/pass counts move as stories land; README drift guard (tests/test_maintainability.py) compares dynamically (BC3)
